experience.description: Leading AI/ML initiatives and platform development as a team leader managing 7 engineers. Architecting and deploying intelligent systems with focus on LLMs, backend infrastructure, and cloud solutions.
achievements: Architected and deployed enterprise-grade LLM solutions with fine-tuning and quantization pipelines
Led a team of 7 engineers in building scalable AI/ML platforms and backend systems
Built production-ready RAG pipelines and implemented vLLMs for optimized inference
Designed and deployed microservices architecture on AWS EC2 with Docker and Kubernetes
Reduced model inference time by 60% through optimization and quantization techniques
Established best practices for LLM deployment, monitoring, and scaling
